description: Join the Binance 3-Day Online Trading Masterclass for Africa, hosted by Dami Odufo. The event features insights from industry experts, including James Preston from Global Crypto. Attendees can participate in Q&A sessions and a giveaway of $100. The masterclass emphasizes the importance of attending all three days for a certificate of participation.
topic_summary: The Binance 3-Day Trading Masterclass covers cryptocurrency trading fundamentals, featuring expert speakers and interactive sessions. Attendees are encouraged to engage through Q&A and can win prizes for participation. The event aims to educate and empower African traders in the crypto space.
